RPI Product Recommendation

RPI Engage Wealth™

The three things that matter when you're preserving what you've built.
Safety • Liquidity • Growth

The Wealth Triangle

You can't have all three at 100%. Every product makes a trade-off. Our job is to build your mix.
🛡️
Pillar 1

SAFETY

What it means: Principal protected from market loss. What you put in, you get back — plus contractual growth.

Downside floor0% loss
Guaranteed rateContractual
Carrier strengthA+ rated only
💧
Pillar 2

LIQUIDITY

What it means: Your money is accessible when you need it. Emergencies, opportunities, RMDs — no penalty.

Free withdrawal10%/yr typical
GLWB riderLifetime income
Emergency accessNursing/terminal
📈
Pillar 3

GROWTH

What it means: Your money keeps up with inflation and outpaces CDs. Indexed to the market without market risk.

Index participationS&P / NASDAQ / custom
Tax deferralYes
Upside capProduct-specific

Side-by-Side Comparison

Populate: Carrier comparison grid for 3-5 candidates. Columns: Carrier + Product, Initial Premium, Free Withdrawal %, Surrender Schedule, Participation Rate or Cap, Guaranteed Rate, Income Rider Availability + Rollup, Death Benefit, AM Best Rating.

Carrier Illustrations

Populate: Links to (or embedded preview of) full carrier illustrations for each recommended product. Pull from DEX or carrier portal. Include year-by-year account value projections at guaranteed, current, and hypothetical 7% scenarios.

Ready to rebuild your mix?

RPI Engage Wealth™ isn't a product — it's a strategy. We build the right combination for where you are.
